perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a grey flat cap peeks out from behind a white curtain, holding a rose-gold small smartphone. (2) The scene cuts to the man in a well-lit indoor setting wearing a beige 'Roots' hoodie, holding a red smartphone and gesturing enthusiastically. (3) He holds a white smartphone, demonstrating its interface and pointing upwards to emphasize performance. (4) He presents a larger white smartphone horizontally, displaying a video on the screen with digital sparkle effects added around the device. (5) A top-down view shows four different iPhones (Rose Gold, Red, White, and a larger White model) being pointed at sequentially on a wooden table. (6) The man points directly at the camera with a smiling expression as a cartoon dog graphic and large stylized text appear in the foreground.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, rhythmic electronic background music begins. An adult male voice speaks with an energetic and friendly tone in Mandarin Chinese. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect occurs during a scene transition. The male voice continues describing features with a consistent volume and pace. (3) Another transition sound effect plays. The background music remains steady in the background while the speaker emphasizes technical specifications like 'A15'. (4) A chiming or 'sparkle' sound effect accompanies the visual reveal of the new phone model. (5) The music reaches a crescendo with a rhythmic drum beat as the speaker asks a concluding question.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '2016年iPhone初代SE登場的時候' (When the first iPhone SE debuted in 2016) - informative tone. (2) Decorative Text: '小巧機身' (Small body), '性能好' (Good performance), '立刻成為經典' (Became a classic immediately) - emphasizing positive traits. (3) Functional Text: '2020年第二代iPhone SE新登場' (2020 2nd gen iPhone SE debut), 'A13處理器' (A13 processor) - factual tone. (4) Functional Text: '2022年iPhone SE 第三代' (2022 iPhone SE 3rd gen), 'A15處理器', '續航升級' (Battery upgrade) - highlighting specs. (5) Hook Text: 'iPhone 16E 2025年全新登場' (iPhone 16E brand new debut in 2025), '蘋果的平價AI的神機' (Apple's affordable AI miracle machine) - exciting, speculative tone. (6) Decorative/Hook Text: '你喜歡哪一個?' (Which one do you like?) - engaging call to action.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Historical Review (SE1, SE2, SE3) -> Future Prediction (16E) -> Comparison & CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the products.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged Asian male with glasses, wearing a grey flat cap and a beige 'Roots' hooded sweatshirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Initial scene features a white curtain; subsequent scenes feature a plain grey/neutral wall background and a light-colored wooden table surface.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Historical Evidence -> Future Teaser -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a retrospective summary of the Apple iPhone SE series while introducing speculation and hype for a rumored or upcoming 'iPhone 16E' model, ultimately engaging the audience to share their preferences.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcasing of specific product lines and mention of future models suggests tech influencer content related to the brand.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of specific social media handles (3c有意思tim哥), trademark flat cap, and variety-show style text graphics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video blends factual tech history with speculative future leaks to maximize engagement and watch time.
